issue_title: Group convolution slower than manually running separate convolutions in CUDA streams
surface_reasoning: Priority 3: labeled `module: performance` + `module: cudnn` + `module: cuda` + `module: convolution`. Title: 'Group convolution slower than manually running separate convolutions in CUDA streams' — canonical dispatch bug where a unified grouped conv kernel is slower than the workaround of running N separate convs. Domain relevance: cuDNN grouped convolution should select an optimized algorithm; this workaround pattern is the defining signal of a broken cuDNN kernel dispatch or algorithm selection.
